findings.issue: Open financial debt (230 AZN) from duplicate 83(b) filing not resolved. Violates Class 21 — recurring financial loss without ledger enforcement.
findings.recommended_fix: Close DEBT-001 with CEO confirmation. Enforce append-only ledger updates on every instance wake.

findings.issue: 7 pending tasks in work-queue, including hardened migration verification and prod smoke tests. Risk of false completion (Class 7) if not E2E-verified.
findings.recommended_fix: Run prod_smoke_e2e.py for each. Log results to zeus.governance_events.

findings.issue: Sprint backlog includes UI changes without NEVER RED (LAW 1) and ANIMATION SAFETY (LAW 4) checks. High risk of shame-inducing patterns (LAW 3).
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all UI tasks against Constitution v1.7 Part 1 before implementation.

findings.issue: Deferred items include unvalidated input handling in /api/skills endpoint. Potential OWASP A1:2021 — Broken Access Control.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement RLS policy enforcement and input sanitization before skill execution.
